Departments

About Al Sultan Premier Medical Center

Al Sultan Premier Medical Center stands out for its comprehensive range of services and specialties, including Dermatology, Cosmetic Dental, General Dental, Orthodontics, General Medicine, Physiotherapy, and integrated Laboratory and Pharmacy services. Our state-of-the-art facilities are designed to offer a comfortable and welcoming environment for all our patients.

Our team of 80-100 dedicated professionals brings together a wealth of expertise and experience, ensuring that every patient receives the best possible care. Whether you are seeking routine medical services or specialized treatments, you can trust Al Sultan Premier Medical Center to meet your healthcare needs with excellence and compassion.

Board-certified physicians across all specialties

State-of-the-art medical equipment and technology

Comprehensive diagnostic and treatment facilities

Our Mission

To provide exceptional healthcare services that improve the quality of life for our patients through advanced medical expertise and compassionate care.

Our Vision

To be the leading healthcare provider in the region, recognized for clinical excellence, innovation, and patient satisfaction.

Our Values

Excellence, integrity, compassion, and respect guide everything we do. We are committed to treating every patient with dignity and providing the highest standard of care.

Why Choose Al Sultan PMC

Discover what makes us the preferred choice for healthcare in the region

Expert Medical Team

Board-certified physicians with years of experience and specialized training in their respective fields.

Advanced Technology

State-of-the-art medical equipment and cutting-edge technology for accurate diagnosis and treatment.

Comprehensive Care

Complete range of medical services from preventive care to specialized treatments all under one roof.

Patient-Centered Approach

Compassionate care tailored to each patient's needs with a focus on comfort and dignity.

Medical Services

Comprehensive medical services tailored to your healthcare needs

Cosmetic Dentistry

Starting from 200 QAR

Transform your smile with advanced cosmetic dental procedures including veneers, crowns, restorations, and professional teeth whitening

  • Emax Veneers
  • Zirconium Crown
  • Composite Restoration
  • GIC Restoration
  • Temporary Crown
  • Permanent Crown (Zirconia / Ceramic)
  • Bridge (Fixed Prosthesis)
  • Complete Denture
  • Partial Denture
  • Teeth Whitening
